deploymentChecklist.title: Run lint before launch
deploymentChecklist.evidence: npm run lint must exit 0 before launch execution.

deploymentChecklist.title: Run typecheck before launch
deploymentChecklist.evidence: npm run typecheck must exit 0 before launch execution.

deploymentChecklist.title: Run production build before launch
deploymentChecklist.evidence: npm run build must exit 0 before launch execution.

deploymentChecklist.title: Validate route /validation/ai-prompt-kit
deploymentChecklist.evidence: /validation/ai-prompt-kit must exist and include Hero, summary, CTA, FAQ, compliance notice, and metadata.
deploymentChecklist.nextAction: Confirm route renders before public launch.

deploymentChecklist.title: Validate route /en/validation/ai-prompt-kit
deploymentChecklist.evidence: /en/validation/ai-prompt-kit must exist and include Hero, summary, CTA, FAQ, compliance notice, and metadata.
deploymentChecklist.nextAction: Confirm route renders before public launch.

deploymentChecklist.title: Confirm metadata
deploymentChecklist.evidence: metadata must be present on validation pages.

deploymentChecklist.title: Confirm title
deploymentChecklist.evidence: title must match the AI Prompt Kit validation offer.

deploymentChecklist.title: Confirm description
deploymentChecklist.evidence: description must explain the validation offer without fabricated outcomes.

deploymentChecklist.title: Confirm FAQ
deploymentChecklist.evidence: FAQ must be present for SEO/GEO answerability.

deploymentChecklist.title: Confirm summary
deploymentChecklist.evidence: summary must be present for AI answer engines.

deploymentChecklist.title: Confirm tracking event validation_ai_prompt_kit_cta_click
deploymentChecklist.evidence: validation_ai_prompt_kit_cta_click must be present in the tracking plan and analytics whitelist.

deploymentChecklist.title: Confirm tracking event validation_faceswap_cta_click
deploymentChecklist.evidence: validation_faceswap_cta_click must be present in the tracking plan and analytics whitelist.

deploymentChecklist.title: Confirm tracking event validation_ai_video_cta_click
deploymentChecklist.evidence: validation_ai_video_cta_click must be present in the tracking plan and analytics whitelist.

deploymentChecklist.title: Confirm validation-input.json exists
deploymentChecklist.evidence: reports/ebos/validation/inputs/2026-07-03-validation-input.json must exist before launch data capture.

deploymentChecklist.title: Confirm external-intake-input.json exists
deploymentChecklist.evidence: reports/ebos/validation/intake/inputs/2026-07-03-external-intake-input.json should exist; keep real channel data empty until observed.

deploymentChecklist.title: Confirm capture report exists
deploymentChecklist.evidence: reports/ebos/validation/capture/2026-07-03-validation-capture-report.json should be available for manual slots.

deploymentChecklist.title: Confirm launch readiness status
deploymentChecklist.evidence: Launch readiness status is ready_with_warnings; ready_with_warnings is acceptable only when warnings are understood.

deploymentChecklist.title: Confirm deployment is user-approved before claiming deployed status
deploymentChecklist.evidence: Do not set deployed_pending_verification until deployment is explicitly confirmed.
deploymentChecklist.nextAction: Codex can prepare checks and reports; user must confirm actual deployment.

deploymentChecklist.title: Rollback validation route if launch fails
deploymentChecklist.evidence: If route deployment fails, rollback the validation route change only; do not clean the whole worktree.

deploymentChecklist.title: Rollback tracking event whitelist only if needed
deploymentChecklist.evidence: If tracking breaks build/runtime, rollback the tracking event whitelist entry with a scoped change.

deploymentChecklist.title: Keep reports during rollback
deploymentChecklist.evidence: Keep reports/ebos artifacts for audit; do not delete evidence while rolling back site code.

CTA copy is present and does not claim unobserved results.
Title and description metadata are present.
CTA tracking plan includes validation_ai_prompt_kit_cta_click.

dataIntakeWorkflow.title: User publishes external platforms
dataIntakeWorkflow.description: Copy the prepared pack into Xianyu, Taobao, Whop, Xiaohongshu, or WeChat manually.
dataIntakeWorkflow.verification: Only user-confirmed public listings or posts are treated as launched.

dataIntakeWorkflow.title: User copies real data to Codex
dataIntakeWorkflow.description: After real views, messages, orders, revenue, refunds, or feedback exist, copy the observed values to Codex.
dataIntakeWorkflow.verification: Unknown or unobserved metrics stay empty or zero.

dataIntakeWorkflow.title: Codex writes external-intake-input.json
dataIntakeWorkflow.description: Codex can transform user-provided observed values into the external intake input.
dataIntakeWorkflow.verification: Input contains only user-provided observed data.

dataIntakeWorkflow.title: dry-run import
dataIntakeWorkflow.description: Preview external intake changes before writing to validation input.
dataIntakeWorkflow.verification: Dry-run import report exists and anomalies are reviewed.

dataIntakeWorkflow.title: apply import
dataIntakeWorkflow.description: Apply external intake only after dry-run review.
dataIntakeWorkflow.verification: Validation input backup and import report are generated.

dataIntakeWorkflow.title: check validation input
dataIntakeWorkflow.description: Validate the merged validation input before reporting.
dataIntakeWorkflow.verification: Validation input check has no fabricated metric warnings.

dataIntakeWorkflow.title: generate decision report
dataIntakeWorkflow.description: Regenerate decision report after validation evidence changes.
dataIntakeWorkflow.verification: Decision report references the latest validation result.

dataIntakeWorkflow.title: generate weekly/monthly
dataIntakeWorkflow.description: Regenerate weekly and monthly EBOS reports after validation updates.
dataIntakeWorkflow.command: npx tsx scripts/generate-ebos-weekly-report.ts --date 2026-07-03 && npx tsx scripts/generate-ebos-monthly-review.ts --date 2026-07-03
dataIntakeWorkflow.verification: Weekly and monthly reports reference launch execution or post-launch checks.

codexExecutableSteps.title: Run build check
codexExecutableSteps.description: 确认 Next.js build 可以通过，避免验证页上线前存在编译错误。

codexExecutableSteps.title: Run lint check
codexExecutableSteps.description: 确认 lint 没有阻断级问题。

codexExecutableSteps.title: Run typecheck check
codexExecutableSteps.description: 确认 TypeScript 类型检查通过。

codexExecutableSteps.title: Check validation page files
codexExecutableSteps.description: 检查 validation page 路由和共享组件是否存在，并包含 Hero、Summary、CTA、FAQ、合规提示和 metadata。
codexExecutableSteps.verification: Readiness report lists both validation pages.

codexExecutableSteps.title: Check CTA tracking
codexExecutableSteps.description: 检查 CTA tracking 事件是否在页面和 analytics 白名单里同时存在。

codexExecutableSteps.title: Check validation-input status
codexExecutableSteps.description: 确认 validation-input 文件存在，且不会把未知外部数据当成真实结果。
codexExecutableSteps.verification: Validation input check completes without fabricated metrics.

codexExecutableSteps.title: Check external intake template
codexExecutableSteps.description: 确认 external intake 模板、可编辑 input 和导入报告路径已经准备好。
codexExecutableSteps.verification: External intake template and input paths exist.

codexExecutableSteps.title: Generate validation launch execution report
codexExecutableSteps.description: Write JSON and Markdown execution artifacts.
codexExecutableSteps.verification: Launch execution report JSON/Markdown are generated.

codexExecutableSteps.title: Prepare post-launch dry-run check
codexExecutableSteps.description: List production URLs to check without network requests.

userMinimumActions: 确认发布验证页，或明确说明暂缓发布的原因。
把平台文案复制到外部平台，不需要手动改代码。
真实发生咨询、订单、退款或用户反馈后，把数据复制给 Codex，不能补猜。
warnings: Codex can prepare launch execution, but cannot log in to external platforms.
Do not fabricate external platform data.
External intake input exists but is not filled with real channel data.
Confirm external-intake-input.json exists: reports/ebos/validation/intake/inputs/2026-07-03-external-intake-input.json should exist; keep real channel data empty until observed.
